race.description: Become A Southside Racing Member Mdn Plate
race.comment: COSMIC SHOWER (6) is ready to make her return after 355 days and strips fitter for a sharp jumpout win. May need the run but the booking of Neindorf suggests she's ready to fire. TAUTO BAR (12) made an encouraging debut last time out finishing in fourth over this trip at Ballarat Synthetic. Has upside and can open his account with Egan taking over. GOODELLO (8) has been thereabouts since resuming and should be hitting her straps now third-up. Likely to be in the finish in this suitable assignment. VALLO (5) also resumes and has jumped out well leading into this. Blinkers go on from a sticky draw for Mott and she looks one of the key hopes.
